summary: Iteration 48 Bug Fixes Verification - 13/13 tests PASSED. All critical fixes verified: (1) Health check working, (2) Both users can login, (3) Data isolation correct - no NULL assignedToId leaks, (4) Portal submit with/without studioId works, (5) Email triggers confirmed in logs, (6) Quote flow complete, (7) Settings API working, (8) Signup creates users. Minor finding: portal.ts fallback assigns to first OWNER by createdAt (different from leads.ts which prefers specific email first).

minor.issue: portal.ts fallback finds first OWNER by createdAt, while leads.ts prioritizes emmanuelobokoh03@gmail.com first. In test DBs with many OWNER users, this can assign to unexpected user.
minor.recommendation: Consider aligning portal.ts lines 606-612 with leads.ts lines 486-499 fallback logic

critical_code_review_comments: portal.ts lines 565-682: /submit endpoint correctly handles studioId and fallback to OWNER
portal.ts line 633: assignedToId is NEVER NULL - always assigned via studioId or fallback
leads.ts lines 97-174: GET /leads correctly filters by assignedToId: userId - no null leak
Email triggers confirmed working: Owner notification, Auto-response, Quote email, Quote accepted, Contract sent
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing (TEST_Portal_*, TEST_Lead_*, TEST_QuoteFlow_*) were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 critical fixes verified: (1) Portal submit assigns leads correctly via studioId or fallback, (2) Data isolation working - no NULL assignedToId in GET /leads, (3) Email triggers firing (logs confirm), (4) Quote flow working with contract auto-generation, (5) Settings API working. Quote accept endpoint is at POST /api/quotes/public/:quoteToken/accept (uses quoteToken, not quoteId).

features_tested.4. DATA ISOLATION: GET /api/leads return: PASSED - All leads have correct assignedToId, no NULL values
features_tested.5. PORTAL SUBMIT without studioId: PASSED - Lead created with fallback assignedToId
features_tested.6. PORTAL SUBMIT with studioId: PASSED - Lead assigned to specified user
features_tested.7. EMAIL TRIGGERS: PASSED - Logs show: Owner notification, Auto-response, Quote email, Quote accepted notification, Contract sent
features_tested.9. AUTOPILOT USER leads: PASSED - Leads visible including portal-submitted ones

email_verification_from_logs.owner_notification: Owner notification email sent successfully: multiple IDs
email_verification_from_logs.quote_email: Quote email sent successfully: multiple IDs
email_verification_from_logs.contract_email: Contract sent email sent to: emmanuelobokoh03@gmail.com

mocked_apis.note: Stripe returns 401 with test key (expected), Resend free tier only sends to owner email (expected)
